creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
How to take a trip to the beach without leaving NYC

How to get there: Take the $4.50 Ferry🛥️ from Pier 11/Wall Street for 50 minutes to Rockaway. From there, take the Free Shuttle Bus🚌 East Bound to 86th Street, walk just a few steps and you’ll end up on the Free to visit Rockaway Beach in Queens!

#nyc #NewYork #beach #daytrip #travel

transcription.text: I'm in New York, and I really want to take a trip to the beach, but I don't have time for a proper vacation, so I'm going to do the next best thing. You'll take this $4.50 ferry ride from Wall Street for 50 minutes past Lady Liberty, get out at Rockaway, take a 6 minute ride on this shuttle bus, get out at 86, and you'll walk right onto this free to visit beach with a boardwalk, all kinds of food, ice cream, beverages, and a beautiful waterfront to lay out, kick it with friends, catch some rays, and soak in the water. This is Rockaway Beach in Queens.
